name: Name
forgot_password_text:
We’ll send a message to your mobile number
to reset your password securely.
enter_otp_text:
We’ve sent a verification code to your mobile number.
Please enter the code and set a new password to continue
cafeteria_balance: Balance available to use in cafeteria
topup_wallet_text: Select an amount or type your own
empty_cart_text: Looks like you haven’t added anything yet.
transfer_credit_text: Enter the amount you want to transfer to Jazz Cafe Admin to use in cafeteria
transfer_back_to_wallet_text: Enter the amount you'd like to transfer back to the wallet
select_ingredients: Select Ingredients that child allergic to
order_placed_text:
Your delicious food is being prepared with care.
You’ll receive a confirmation and delivery update shortly.
credit_transfer_text: No credits have been transferred yet. Start sending credits to others instantly.
pre_order_text: You haven’t placed any pre-orders yet. Start exploring items available in advance.
consumptions_text: No consumption records found yet. Your meal or service usage will appear here.
pay_for_service_text: You haven't made any payments yet. Start by selecting a service to pay for.
cafeteria_topups_text: You haven’t topped up your cafeteria balance yet. Add funds now to enjoy seamless food purchases.
wallet_transactions_text: You haven’t made any wallet transactions yet. Your deposits and expenses will show up here.
account_delete:
Your account has been permanently deleted.
We're sorry to see you go.
delete_account_text: This will permanently delete all your account data from our servers. This action is irreversible. Type “Delete” in the text box below to confirm
service_text:
Subscribe to delicious, timely food meals effortlessly.
Use this service to make fast and hassle-free meal payments
no_plan: There are currently no meal plans available.
reason_text: Please provide a reason for pausing this service
plan_success: Your plan is successfully purchased and ready to use.
